Dipsea/Steep Ravine (Stinson To Pantoll)

Run Segment Marin County, California
  • Distance4.11km
  • Elevation Gain493m
  • Avg Grade9.9%
  • Lowest Elev42m
  • Highest Elev449m
  • Elev Difference407m
  • Climb Category2
  • 9,397 Attempts By 5,841 People
